title: Director, Division of Early Childhood Education
notes: Largest district in OH. Has dedicated Division of Early Childhood Education with significant ODEW-funded preschool footprint. General ECE inbox: eceenrollment@columbus.k12.oh.us. ECE office at Southland Center, 3700 S. High St. Direct email masked on ZoomInfo (t***@columbus.k12.oh.us); likely baker.te@columbus.k12.oh.us pattern but unverified.

title: Superintendent / 9-12 Principal
notes: Very small Putnam County district (~500 students). Superintendent doubles as HS principal — no separate curriculum or ECE director. Email format @mcncschools.org confirmed by ZoomInfo but full address not public; help inbox: help@mail.ml.noacsc.org.

title: Superintendent and Chief Administrative Officer
notes: STEM community school (charter) in Kettering, K-12 with no traditional preschool program. No ECE/curriculum director listed; superintendent is primary contact. General inbox listed; direct email not public.

title: Director of Curriculum and Instruction
notes: Runs First Step Preschool (Pleasantview campus) with Step Up to Quality Gold rating. Curriculum aligned to Ohio Early Learning and Development Standards.

title: Assistant Superintendent (Curriculum)
notes: 6th-largest district in Ohio. Runs Head Start/ECE program (614-801-3190). Patrick Callaghan is Interim Executive Director - Elementary Education (closer ECE alignment). Email pattern likely brian.bowser@swcsd.us but unconfirmed.

title: Assistant Superintendent (formerly Director of Teaching and Learning)
notes: ECE program since 1990 uses Creative Curriculum + Second Step SEL. Board approved repurposing Lincoln Elementary into new Early Learning Center for 2027-2028 — strong PreK expansion signal. Ast promoted from Director of T&L to Asst Supt to replace retiring Dr. Christine Palumbo. Email format @lakewoodcityschools.org confirmed but direct address masked.

title: Preschool Coordinator, Pickerington Early Learning Center
notes: Preschool uses Creative Curriculum. Higher-level: Dr. Alesia Gillison, Assistant Superintendent / Chief Academic Officer (alesia_gillison@plsd.us, 614-833-2110).

title: Superintendent / CEO
notes: Operates Step Up to Quality Gold-rated Clark Early Learning Center using HighScope Preschool Curriculum, Conscious Discipline, PBIS, MTSS, Leader in Me. Clark Principal is Caitlin Smith (new for 2023-24). Hill leads 10-director cabinet; no dedicated ECE director surfaced on public org chart. Hill won 2024 Ohio Supt Award of Excellence.

title: Coordinator of Preschool Programs / Coordinator of Special Education for Preschool
notes: GJPS Preschool at Clark Hall + Goshen Lane. Rated by Step Up to Quality. Curriculum aligned to Ohio's Early Learning and Development Standards.

title: Director of Curriculum and Instruction
notes: C&I oversees PreK-12. Operates a dedicated district preschool. Deputy Director of Academics: Tamara Bishko. Email format @selschools.org; direct address not public.

title: Principal, Strongsville Early Learning Preschool
notes: Uses Creative Curriculum for Preschool Foundation + GOLD Assessment. Aligned to Ohio Early Learning and Development Standards.

title: Director of Curriculum and Instruction
notes: Approved for Director role effective Aug 1, 2023 (3-year admin contract — relatively new in role). Preschool partners with Footsteps2Brilliance. Email format @mayfieldschools.org; direct address not public.

title: Associate Director of Curriculum, Instruction, and Technology
notes: Runs Kleptz Early Learning Center (K-1-2) and Northmont Preschool. District underwent reading curriculum review/adoption process (2024). Strategic plan T&L work led by Zink and team.

title: Preschool Supervisor / Early Childhood Education
notes: Superintendent is Andre Rudolph. District publicly announced preschool expansion in 2019. ECE program emphasizes integrated cognitive, communication, social-emotional, and motor development.

title: Associate Superintendent of Academic Services
notes: Runs Elyria Early Childhood Village (EECV, 42331 Griswold Rd) + Hamilton Elementary preschool wing. EECV Principal: Jackie Plantner. Griffiths appointed Associate Supt of Academic Services effective Aug 1, 2025. Email @elyriaschools.org; address masked.

title: Assistant Superintendent / Curriculum Director
notes: Fulton County rural district. Board recently adopted new K-5 ELA curriculum (April 2025 — strong recent adoption signal). Superintendent: Eric J. Smola (esmola@evgvikings.org). Swineford recently interviewed for superintendent roles at Eastwood and Elmwood (potential turnover risk).

title: Superintendent
notes: Small rural district (~1,900 students across Fayette, Highland, Ross counties). No separate curriculum director surfaced; Gray previously served as curriculum director at Miami Trace and Chillicothe and as Greenfield elementary principal before becoming superintendent — strong instructional background. District uses greenfieldmcclain.org or greenfield.k12.oh.us; direct email not public.

title: Director of Curriculum, Instruction and Assessment
notes: Stark County district. Note: email is @jackson.sparcc.org (SPARCC consortium), not jackson.stark.k12.oh.us — this is district domain, not an ESC. Myers earned doctorate in Ed Leadership 2021 from Ashland; received 2020 Outstanding Administrator award.

title: Assistant Superintendent: Academics
notes: Preschool has Step Up To Quality 5-Star rating. Superintendent: Brian Murphy. Email pattern @mcspresidents.org confirmed; direct address inferred from ZoomInfo pattern (g***@mcspresidents.org) — verify before sending.

title: Director of Elementary Education (PreK-5)
notes: Operates Burbank Early Childhood School (BECS) — Early Intervention + full-day tuition preschool. Email available via UA staff directory but masked in public search. Affluent suburban district.

title: Principal, Big Walnut Early Learning Center at Harrison Street
notes: Delaware County district (~4,200 students). Operates dedicated Early Learning Center at Harrison St. Shelton is BW veteran (21 years); holds M.Ed Admin from Ashland, BS Child & Family Studies/Child Development from OSU. District also has Mike Robertson, Director of Academic Achievement (district-wide curriculum lead). Email format @bwls.net not publicly listed for either.

title: Director of Elementary Curriculum and Instruction
notes: District runs Mt. Logan Early Childhood Center (Supervisor: Kim Suwannasing, 740-773-2638). Email format firstname.lastname@ccsd.us confirmed for 56% of staff — inferred address marked Low/Medium confidence. Superintendent Deborah Swinehart (deborah.swinehart@ccsd.us) was previously Director of Special Ed and Elementary Curriculum.

title: Preschool Director
notes: Cambridge Preschool is Step Up to Quality Gold-rated, ages 3-5. Superintendent: Dan Coffman. Admin Assistant: Audra Carpenter (audra.carpenter@cambridgecityschools.org) — email format confirmed via this. Direct email for Stillion not public.

title: Superintendent
notes: Recently lost ~35 staff in budget cuts (signal of fiscal stress). No dedicated curriculum or ECE director surfaced publicly. McCorkle hired Aug 2024 from Green Local. District runs Reverse Inclusion Preschool / ECSE. Direct email not public.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small rural district in Sarahsville (Noble County) — largest in county. No dedicated curriculum or ECE director. Denius named 14th superintendent in 2023; long-tenured Noble Local staff (since 1997).

title: Assistant Superintendent of Teaching and Learning
notes: Operates Loveland Early Childhood Center (LECC) for PreK + K. Principal: Matt Patterson (patterma@lovelandschools.org, 513-683-4200, started Aug 2023). Curriculum guided by Ohio Early Learning Content Standards. Strong literacy focus.

title: Superintendent (transitioning)
notes: MAJOR LEADERSHIP TRANSITION: Wagner was named Ohio State Superintendent of Public Instruction (March 2026) — likely no longer at district. Wagner is former school psychologist + director of student services. No separate curriculum director surfaced for this Ohio district (the 'Nicole Panton' result is Greater Johnstown SD in NY — different district). District contact info verify needed.

title: Director of Teaching & Learning
notes: Preschool earned 5-Star Step Up to Quality rating. Oxford, OH (Miami University area). Bailey may also hold HR director responsibilities per ZoomInfo. Email @talawanda.org confirmed; direct address masked. Note: some ZoomInfo entries show Bailey as Director of HR — title may be combined.

title: Executive Director of Teaching and Learning (PreK-6)
notes: Operates dedicated Early Childhood Central Campus (PreK-K) at 825 Waycross Rd, Cincinnati. 5-Star Step Up to Quality. Martin has 15+ years at Winton Woods; holds Doctor of Executive Leadership + Superintendent Licensure (Miami). Email @wintonwoods.org masked.

title: Superintendent (incoming)
notes: NEW SUPERINTENDENT: Board hired Larry Hook May 4, 2026 — coming from Forest Hills Local (Cincinnati, ~7,000 students). Asst Supt of Operations/Personnel: Greg Grooms (937-544-5586 ext 17150). No dedicated ECE/curriculum director publicly surfaced. Rural southern Ohio district.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small district (~1,500 students), Fairfield County. No separate curriculum director — superintendent is primary contact. Edwards started 2022. Recently approved new elementary principal (Foresta Shope) and PK-5 asst principal (Stephanie Tack) in July 2025 — signals elementary leadership change.

title: Director of Curriculum, Technology Integration & Innovation
notes: Paulding County rural district. District profiled in Education Magazine for innovation/aquaponics center. Superintendent: Dr. Martin A. Miller (long-tenured, ~11 years). Note district uses antwerpschools.org domain, not the aw.noacsc.org listed in source data (NOACSC is the ESC consortium domain — old).

title: Superintendent
notes: ~2,883 students, 7 schools. Public staff directory shows Julie Fulton (Director of Special Ed/Student Services), Valerie Harper (Director of State & Federal Programs), Gabriella Vendetti (HR Director). NO dedicated curriculum director publicly listed — superintendent is best contact. Email format @aacs.net masked.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small rural Belmont County district. No separate curriculum/ECE director — superintendent is primary. Fuchs took over Sept 2023 after Angie Hannahs retired. Note: district appears to be migrating from barnesville.k12.oh.us to bevsd.org domain (both active).

title: Superintendent
notes: Columbiana County rural district (~1,692 students, K-12). Lowe in 9th+ year as superintendent (since 2016). Recently received near-perfect state Report Card rating (2025). No separate curriculum director publicly listed. Elementary Principal: Brianne Hall (Brianne.Hall@beaverlocal.org).

title: Director of Curriculum and Instruction
notes: Director since 2015 — long tenure. Bellevue Schools Preschool earned Gold Step Up To Quality. Swartz oversees curriculum, instruction, assessment, federal programs, and PD.

title: Superintendent
notes: Tipp City area, Miami County. No dedicated curriculum director publicly listed. Director of Student Services: Eric Marthaler. Welcome ES referenced as elementary site. Email format @bethelk12.org; direct address not public.

notes: Fairfield County district (~2,200 students). Spangler joined Bloom-Carroll in 2024 from Lancaster CSD. District actively recruited a Curriculum, Communications & Gifted Coordinator (job posting signal — role may now be filled or open). Email format @bloom-carroll.k12.oh.us masked on ZoomInfo.

title: Superintendent
notes: Very small Shelby County district. No separate curriculum director — superintendent is primary. Elementary Principal: Chris Abke.

title: Superintendent
notes: Very small Trumbull County district (~453 students K-12). No separate curriculum director — superintendent is primary.
